headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Williams-Sonoma, Lowers Price Target to $191
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Steven Shemesh   maintains Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $213 to $191.
